body.value: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.

description:
## Combination Facet
A powerful filtering tool that allows users to refine searches by selecting multiple related attributes, such as year, make, and model for vehicles or parts. Ideal for complex product searches, this component helps customers quickly narrow down results to find the exact item that matches their needs.
